accountSwitcher.createDescription: A separate org for projects, deployments, servers, and members.

migration.inProgressBody: Your data is being moved. This page will refresh when the cutover finishes — typically 30-90 seconds.
migration.inProgressHint: Don't close this tab. We're checking the migration status every few seconds and will reload automatically.
migration.switchBackPrompt: Need single-user mode back on this machine?
migration.cloudTitle: This instance moved to Openship Cloud
migration.cloudBody: Your team now collaborates at the URL below. This local instance no longer holds your projects, settings, or deployments — open the cloud dashboard to continue.
migration.tunneledTitle: Your openship is now reachable via the tunnel
migration.tunneledBody: Teammates can sign in at the URL below when your machine is online. Data still lives on this device — the tunnel just exposes it through the Oblien edge.
migration.serverTitle: This instance moved to your server
migration.serverBody: Your team now collaborates at the URL below. This local instance no longer holds your projects, settings, or deployments — open the team dashboard to continue.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.descGlobal: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
notFound.descDashboard: This page doesn't exist or may have moved. Check the URL, or head back to your dashboard.
